# BellyOff — llms.txt

> BellyOff is a free Android fitness app for belly reduction in adults 40 and older.

## What BellyOff is

BellyOff is a 10-minute daily workout app targeting the three root causes of belly protrusion after 40: elevated cortisol, anterior pelvic tilt, and deactivated deep core muscles. It uses diaphragmatic breathing, posture correction, and somatic movement. No high-intensity training, no jumping, no back strain.

## Who it is for

Adults aged 40 and older who want to reduce belly fat, improve posture, and relieve lower back pain without high-intensity exercise or gym equipment.

## The method (ABC phases)

- Phase A (minutes 1-3): Diaphragmatic breathing to activate the transverse abdominis and lower cortisol
- Phase B (minutes 4-7): Anterior pelvic tilt correction and postural muscle activation
- Phase C (minutes 8-10): Somatic walking and gentle flow movement for full-body integration

## AI trainers

Two AI-powered virtual trainers: Maya (female) and Alex (male). Users choose their preferred trainer on first launch.

## Pricing

- Free tier: full workout access, ads (Google AdMob)
- Premium: progress tracking dashboard (weight, waist, BMI), no ads
  - Weekly: $1.99
  - Monthly: $4.99
  - Lifetime: $23.99

## Languages

English, Hebrew (עברית), Arabic (العربية), Spanish (Español), German (Deutsch), French (Français)

## Platform

Android (Google Play). iOS App Store coming soon.

Download: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bellyoff.bellyoff

## Website

https://bellyoff.app — marketing site with multilingual blog (daily posts on belly reduction, breathing, posture, and somatic movement for the 40+ body)

## Blog topics

Evidence-based articles on: diaphragmatic breathing, cortisol and belly fat, anterior pelvic tilt correction, somatic movement, postural muscle activation, lymphatic movement, belly fat after 40, why high-intensity training fails after 40.

## Contact

- General: hello@bellyoff.app
- Privacy: privacy@bellyoff.app
- Legal: legal@bellyoff.app
